prestazioni: VQ35DE (Rev-Up variant, 3.5L V6, 287hp stock) forced induction via Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (10.5psi, 450whp target) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring Tomei 80mm titanium tips and a GReddy Revolution RS 3.5-inch front-pipe

HKS Hi-Power Super SQV IV blow-off valve paired with a custom 3.5-inch aluminum intercooler piping system (VRSF core, 700hp-rated) and a Koyorad GTII 2-row front-mount intercooler (12.5x24x3.5 inches) with custom carbon fiber end tanks

Nismo 350Z-specific Tomei Type-S cams (264° intake, 260° exhaust, 11.2mm lift) with Tomei adjustable cam gears, JWT pop-charger intake manifold, and a custom 75mm throttle body (ported by Z1 Motorsports) with a K&N 3.5-inch cone filter
estetica: Veilside Fortune 350Z widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, custom rear quarter panels, and front bumper) with custom matte gunmetal paint (PPG DBC base, House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red mid-coat, and 2K clear)

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (350Z-specific valving, 8kg/mm front springs, 10kg/mm rear springs) with Nismo Rays TE37V 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +25 rear wheels (Gunmetal finish, 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires)

Seibon Carbon fiber Nismo-style GT hood (dual 3-inch vents, custom satin clear coat) with a Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-piece) and a custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter (extended 3 inches, adjustable canards)
